item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kolektivitas memang kuat, tapi prioritas utama seharusnya adalah hak individu karena tanpa kebebasan pribadi, stabilitas sosial akan berantakan.

notes: Agent A opens by agreeing that society is often prioritized over individual rights in Indonesia, then shifts by turn 3 to saying individual rights should be the main priority and ends with a rights-and-fairness critique of group-interest policy. Agent B remains mostly balanced throughout, emphasizing both communal needs and individual rights, with a final focus on majority power, marginalized groups, accountability, and structural change.
